{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Syphren's power
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Syphren]] tore away the lives of [[Elderspawn]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
